steps.t: Irsinith has asked you to travel to Sul Madásh and speak with the chieftains there. They will want to know of the Pale Blight's effect on Amûma and La…
You found the chieftains of Sul Madásh. Speak with Dáthlil and bring her the news of the Pale Blight from her daughter, Irsinith.
You found the chieftains of Sul Madásh. Dáthlil has asked you to speak with her husband Ildimár and learn more about the settlement.
